scenario.context: Station 08 of the day run: final evaluation of the UI development.
scenario.mission: You reflect on goal achievement, open points, and improvements for the next development cycle.

constraints: Base the target-versus-actual comparison on facts

customerRequest.subject: Station 08: UI close and reflection
customerRequest.body: Please create a closing reflection with goal achievement, risk, and a concrete follow-up plan.

questions.title: Start the target-versus-actual review
questions.prompt: What is the most sensible start to the closing reflection?

options.text: Compare goals and achieved results in a structured way
options.rationale: Creates a factual basis for evaluation.

feedback.correct: Correct: The target-versus-actual view is the sound basis.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Reflection needs goal reference and facts.

questions.title: Derive improvements
questions.prompt: Which points help create robust improvement measures? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Name the cause and effect of a problem
Assign an owner and date to the measure

feedback.correct: Correct: The measures are set up to be implementable.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please secure cause reference and commitment more strongly.

questions.title: LF10 closing process
questions.prompt: Put the flow for the UI project close in order.

feedback.correct: Correct: This is a professional closing process.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please keep analysis and prioritization before communication.

questions.title: Goal-achievement rate
questions.prompt: Out of 22 defined UI goals, 18 were achieved. What is the goal-achievement rate in percent (rounded)?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the share of achieved goals correctly.

questions.title: Closing note
questions.prompt: Formulate a closing note in 4-6 sentences with goal achievement, a remaining point, and the next improvement.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear goal status, transparent remaining point, and a concrete improvement for the next cycle.

feedback.correct: Correct: The closing note is action-oriented.
feedback.wrong: Please develop goal achievement, the remaining point, and the improvement more clearly.
